untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of left vs right top volume over 5-day surrounding periods and double-top pattern detection. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and contextual volume comparison not expressible with single-bar indicators. Also, exact breakout identification and pullback probability (59%) cannot be operationalized without pattern library or lookback functions.
translation_notes: Partial translation attempted: Entry conditions use light breakout volume proxy (volume < sma_5 and vol_ratio_20 < 1.0). Exit uses simple pullback reversal. Cannot encode: (1) Double-top pattern structure, (2) Left vs right top volume differential over 5-day periods, (3) Heavier right-top volume detection, (4) Specific 59% pullback occurrence probability. Author silent on targets—used 5% stop based on failure_rate_5pct. Direction set to SHORT per 72% bear success rate and 19% average decline.
